title: Eclipsium: Positives and Negatives
description:
My first mod, linked with my other mods
DO NOT JUST INSTALL THE LATEST, GET EVERY MODE WITH A SPECIAL NAME (Except eclipsiumfive)
body:
# Enter a new universe of two polarities.

## Contact my alt: kid_versus on discord for additional info and updates. I will also be posting a mod review or getting someone to do it for me. 
### **_DO NOT JUST INSTALL THE LATEST, GET EVERY MODE WITH A SPECIAL NAME (Except eclipsiumfive) and put it in your mods folder!_**

**_IN THE FUTURE MAKE SURE YOU DOWLOAD BOTH ECLIPSIUM THREE AAAND ECLIPSIUM FIVE FILES (Until I fix my code)
_Eclipsium Three is an unfinished version as my mod development software is crashing for no reason. Once this gets fix, it will be updated, however currently Eclipsium Five isn't broken and it'll be a part 2._**

  _** Mods contents (with some hidden surprises)**_
  Eclipse Gem Ore, craft these into blocks to make a portal, use glowstone to duplicate them.

  Eclipse Dimension (Custom skybox not yet implemented as of 2.2.0), positive and negative biomes, each with their own mobs.

  Positive Rabbit, a cute living cotton candy on a stick, and can have items stored in them. Drops cottontail meat

  Negative snake, currently just the predator of the rabbit, but it will have a custom drop in the future (2.5.0 (?))

  Positive Secretary Bird, animations will be updated as of 3.0.0 (?), and they eat snakes. 

  Cottontail meat as a 1 in 3 chance to give the crazed effect, otherwise it gives speed and jumpboost 3.

  Negative and positive ore, economy by being able to transporm intol gold and iron.

  Combine positive and negative ingots into blocks and light portals to the Pure Positive/Negative dimension (seperate).

  You gain the crafting recipe to make a polarized portal which teleports you between the pure dimensions (extremely useful since they are paralell generation)

  Custom tree/wood types, flowers, and bushs. (Try putting a negative bushle in a brewing stand with bowls)

  Combine negative and positive ingots to get implosion capsules, which have some weird but very fun mechanics.

(Update: Ironically Bushle soup is unobtainable and has no custom affect due to the fact that it was exported before the project crashed, and thereby doesn't work)
